channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Thousands in Peru protest Fujimori presidential run
item.description: Thousands of demonstrators took to the streets of Lima to protest the presidential bid of Keiko Fujimori.

item.title: Emotional scenes as more survivors pulled from flooded Laos cave
item.description: Divers in Laos have rescued four more villagers trapped in a flooded cave. The first survivor was pulled out on Friday.

item.title: Rescues in eastern Syria after the Euphrates River bursts its banks
item.description: Rescue workers have pulled stranded farmers from flood waters in eastern Syria after the Euphrates burst its banks.

item.title: Iran war live: Lebanon slams Israel’s invasion; US-Tehran deal in limbo
item.description: Lebanese PM describes Israel's attacks as collective punishment as US warns Iran of strikes if no deal is reached.

item.title: US Congress advances American-Israeli military integration plan
item.description: A provision in the 2027 draft US defence bill could bind the two countries' weapons industries closer than ever.

item.title: Al Jazeera exclusive interview with rebel FARC faction in Colombia
item.description: In Colombia, FARC dissidents say they returned to war after a historic peace deal failed to deliver security

item.title: Lebanese army ‘overly stretched’ to fight off latest Israeli invasion
item.description: Geopolitical analyst Joe Macaron says the Lebanese army is ‘overly stretched’ as Israeli troops expand their occupation.

item.title: PSG beat Arsenal to win back-to-back Champions League titles after shootout
item.description: PSG win back-to-back Champions League titles with 4-3 shoot-out win over Arsenal following a 1-1 draw after extra time.

item.title: Women bear the brunt of DRC’s Ebola outbreak
item.description: Women bear the brunt of DRC's Ebola outbreak.

item.title: Putin says drone that crashed in Romania likely Ukrainian
item.description: Putin says drone that crashed in Romania likely Ukrainian.

item.title: Is the war in Ukraine entering a new phase?
item.description: NATO says it is ready to defend allied territory against Russian attacks.

item.title: Iran reasserts control over Hormuz Strait as deal with US remains elusive
item.description: Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth says US 'more than capable' of restarting war if satisfactory deal not reached.

item.title: Qatar says temporary charges ‘negotiable’
item.description: Qatar rejects a set Strait of Hormuz toll, says temporary charges 'negotiable'.

item.title: Bruce Springsteen calls out Trump’s ‘reckless’ administration
item.description: At a concert in the US capital, Washington, DC, musical legend Bruce Springsteen slammed US President Donald Trump.

item.title: 22 killed as truck carrying refugees overturns in Afghanistan
item.description: 22 people have been killed and 36 others injured when a truck carrying recently returned Afghan refugees overturned

item.title: Voters in Malta head to polls for early elections
item.description: Maltese voters are at the polls after PM Robert Abela called a snap election.

item.title: Two killed, including Palestinian doctor, in Israeli attacks on Gaza
item.description: Several injured in Gaza, while Israeli settlers attack Palestinian homes and property across the occupied West Bank.

item.title: Liverpool sack Arne Slot after disastrous Premier League title defence
item.description: Liverpool have sacked head coach Arne Slot after a fifth-place finish in their Premier League title defence.

item.title: Confirmed Ebola cases nearly double in days as WHO chief visits DR Congo
item.description: WHO's Tedros calls for a community-led fight as a rare Ebola strain spreads rapidly through conflict-hit eastern DRC.

item.title: ‘Opposite visions’: What to know about Colombia’s presidential election
item.description: Senator Ivan Cepeda is leading two right-wing rivals in the first round of an election dominated by security concerns.

item.title: Indonesia’s Mount Merapi volcano erupts, spewing ash into the sky
item.description: Videos show Indonesia’s Mount Merapi spewing a column of ash around 2 kilometres high in West Sumatra.

item.title: Senior Sri Lankan monk suspended over child sex abuse allegation
item.description: Pallegama Hemarathana is accused of abusing an 11-year-old girl in a Buddhist temple in 2022.

item.title: Rescuers free four more men from flooded Laos cave, two still missing
item.description: Five of seven men who entered cave seeking gold are now out after being trapped for 10 days.

item.title: Truck carrying Afghan returnees from Pakistan flips on highway, killing 18
item.description: At least 10 children among the dead as a packed truck carrying families returning from Pakistan flips on major highway.

item.title: Israeli soldiers reach Nabatieh, one of southern Lebanon’s biggest cities
item.description: Israel’s military has advanced beyond Lebanon's Litani River for the first time since 2006.
